template: Mistral-7B-v0.3 Base magnitude dose-response — K ≈ V disconfirms universality, digital encoding confirmed Qwen-specific
key_finding: Mistral-Base is FULLY ANALOG (no cliffs), confirming digital encoding is Qwen-specific. SURPRISE: K ≈ V — gap is only +0-6pp across all doses (vs +17-78pp on other models). K > V universality DISCONFIRMED on 5th variant. V-only σ=1: 47/47 (228/228 combined). Superadditivity strong (2.2-13.3x), consistent with analog encoding. Mistral K is most robust of all models (100% at σ=1.0).
evidence_impact: Strong — resolves Base-vs-Qwen encoding confound (digital = Qwen-specific). Moderate — K ≈ V finding challenges universality of K > V. V-only immunity extends to 5th variant. Encoding taxonomy complete at 5 variants across 4 families.
next_planned: Priority: (1) Test Mistral direction perturbation to see if K > V holds there. (2) Evidence consolidation and final synthesis. (3) Consider Mistral-Instruct to test if instruction tuning creates K > V.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space. Combined p=0.013 (K 6/56 vs V 0/57). Survives maximum-effort V-only disconfirmation.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED on spatial selectivity. Geometric/distributed confirmed by literature

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG and universal across 3 families. Explained by attention sinks at early positions

geometric_dissociation.status: REVISED: K-V dissociation holds on 4/5 variants but K ≈ V on Mistral-Base. K>V NOT universal — may depend on training type or architecture. Gaps: +17-78pp on 4 models, +0-6pp on Mistral.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. Sparse attention explains V immunity

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families + 5 training variants tested. V-only σ=1 immunity: 228/228 combined. K > V: 4/5 confirmed, 1/5 disconfirmed.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY: Qwen-Base=FULLY DIGITAL. Qwen-Instruct=MIXED. Llama-Instruct=FULLY ANALOG. Phi-Instruct=FULLY ANALOG. Mistral-Base=FULLY ANALOG. Digital = Qwen-specific.

superadditive_interaction.status: MECHANISM CONFIRMED on 5th model: Mistral analog → strong superadditivity (2.2-13.3x). All analog models show strong superadditivity. Only digital Qwen-Base shows weak (1.1-2.0x).

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 5+ independent groups. Gradient bottleneck. QK/OV framework grounds K>V. K-only PGD is novel experimental validation

null_space_kv_unification.status: STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT: K-only PGD 6/56 vs V-only 0/57 (p=0.013). V-only failure is NOT hyperparameter artifact.

disruption_vs_redirection.status: V=disruption (0 numeric redirects ever), K=redirection (2 genuine numeric redirects). Quality distinction holds.

mha_vs_gqa.status: K > V holds on MHA (Phi) identically to GQA (Qwen/Llama). Phi analog encoding. GQA confound eliminated.

base_vs_instruct.status: EXPANDED: Mistral-Base is analog (like Llama/Phi-Instruct). K digital is Qwen-family-specific, NOT base-model-specific. V digital is Qwen-Base-specific.

k_v_universality.status: NEW: K > V holds on 4/5 variants (Qwen-Base, Qwen-Instruct, Llama-Instruct, Phi-Instruct) but FAILS on Mistral-Base (K ≈ V, gap +0-6pp). Universality claim requires revision.
